name: Stibo Systems STEP MDM & PIM API
what_it_does: Stibo Systems STEP REST API for Master Data Management (MDM) and Product Information Management (PIM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product master data and attribute management, handle customer, supplier, and location master data workflows, access data governance and quality workflows, retrieve product hierarchy and classification data, manage digital assets and media file association, handle workflow and approval process automation, access data validation and enrichment workflows, retrieve cross-reference and relationship data, manage multi-language and multi-channel product data, and integrate master data with ERP, e-commerce, and analytics systems.
use_cases: Managing product master data and attribute enrichment from catalog automation agents
Handling data governance and quality workflows from MDM automation agents
Retrieving product hierarchy and classification from commerce automation agents
Integrating master data with ERP and e-commerce from enterprise data agents
not_for: Simple product catalog without enterprise MDM complexity
Small businesses without multi-source data consolidation needs
Single-system data management without cross-system master data challenges
best_when: An enterprise using Stibo Systems STEP for MDM or PIM wants AI agents to automate product data enrichment, data quality workflows, hierarchy management, digital asset association, and ERP/e-commerce integration.
avoid_when: DATA GOVERNANCE: MDM changes to master data records propagate downstream to all consuming systems — automated changes to core business entities require approval workflows and data stewardship. Master data includes sensitive business information (pricing, suppliers, customers). Incorrect data governance automation can corrupt enterprise-wide data consistency.

auth.notes: Stibo Systems uses OAuth 2.0 for STEP API access. System and user-level credentials with data model, workflow, and content scopes. Developer documentation portal. Webhooks for workflow and data change events. STEP is configurable MDM/PIM platform with REST and SOAP API surfaces.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise MDM/PIM subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise license and subscription; pricing based on scope and data volume
pricing.notes: Aarhus, Denmark. Founded 1794 (as Stibo Group printing company); STEP software division since 1988. Private, family-owned. Global MDM/PIM market leader. 800+ enterprise customers including Mattel, Michelin, and Bayer. STEP platform handles product, customer, supplier, and location master data. Competes with Akeneo and Informatica for MDM/PIM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; bulk data operations throttled

known_agent_gotchas: DATA GOVERNANCE: Master data changes propagate to all downstream systems — automated updates require stewardship approval
STEP is highly configurable — API shape varies significantly between customer implementations
No public MCP server — REST API with developer documentation portal
Data model complexity — STEP data model is implementation-specific; agents need customer-specific schema knowledge
Workflow automation must respect data governance policies — not all entities can be auto-approved
Bulk data operations are slow — large master data updates require async job patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Master data and product information. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Enterprise master data governance sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: MDM and PIM data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Enterprise master data governance.
